statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // "unknown"'); five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty'); five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty'); week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty'); week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty'); out="$model"; if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then five_reset_str=$([ -n "$five_reset" ] && date -d "@$five_reset" "+%H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "?"); out="$out | 5h: $(printf '%.0f' "$five_pct")% (resets $five_reset_str)"; fi; if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then week_reset_str=$([ -n "$week_reset" ] && date -d "@$week_reset" "+%m/%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "?"); out="$out | 7d: $(printf '%.0f' "$week_pct")% (resets $week_reset_str)"; fi; echo "$out"
